models.description: Best 8 GB option. Code specialist, 88.4% HumanEval, native tool calling, 92+ languages.
Best 32 GB option. 68.0% SWE-bench Verified. Dense 24B, agentic coding, 256K context. European model (Mistral AI, France).
16 GB alt. MoE 16B/2.4B active. Fast inference, 338 languages.
32 GB tier. MoE 30B/3B active. Agentic tool use, 256K context.
Efficient 4B model. Fits in GPU on 8 GB. Good for quick tasks; prefer a code-specialist for dojo.
Fast 2B model. Fits in GPU on 8 GB M2. Tool calling unreliable on complex tasks.
Best CPU option. Qwen2.5-Coder-7B INT4 for OpenVINO. ~4 GB RAM. 88.4% HumanEval.
Lightweight CPU option. Qwen2.5-Coder-3B INT4 for OpenVINO. ~2 GB RAM.
High-capability CPU option. Qwen2.5-Coder-14B INT4 for OpenVINO. ~8 GB RAM. 128K context.
